prompt:
[capsule v1 review]
anchors: "x-user-id" | "401"
diff: - const userId=session.userId;+ const userId=req.headers['x-user-id'] || session.userId;if(!userId)return res.status(401).end();
context: this handler is behind the public API gateway. Keep the report concise but include risk and verification.
deliver: concise_risk; mitigation; verification
